entity.name: InfiniteZero Foundation
entity.description: Building a trustless, privacy-first AI commons — data stays local while applications train AI at scale, deployed on Ethereum for real-world impact. Recognised by the Ethereum Foundation, Edge City, and founded at the University of Oxford.

projects.name: Decentralized Intelligence Network (DIN)
projects.description: Open infrastructure for training AI as a public good. Millions of devices contribute to shared AI models using federated learning — raw data never leaves the user's device. No one company controls it. No one company profits from it. It just gets better, for everyone, together.

channels.description: Contact for grants and institutional funding.

plans.name: Protocol Sustainer
plans.description: Supports ongoing development of the DIN protocol, smart contracts, and federated learning infrastructure.

plans.name: Goodwill contribution
plans.description: Any amount to support open AI infrastructure built for the public good.

history.description: Edge City SHIFT Grant ($40k supported by Vitalik Buterin), Cosmos Institute grant ($5k).
